basics.name: Anss Khaled Farouk
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software Engineer with expertise in building robust and scalable front-end and back-end systems. My focus is on developing web applications that are not only visually appealing but also highly functional and optimized for performance.

work.name: Pixelogic Media
work.summary: Building and evolving a complex media platform using Ruby on Rails and ReactJS. Leading technical initiatives end-to-end — from architectural decisions to delivery — with a focus on reliability, performance, and clean, scalable code.
highlights: Led an end-to-end replacement of the core rich-text editor, managing the project from proof-of-concept through execution; redesigned the component architecture to separate layers and hide editor-specific implementation details
Integrated OpenSearch to power advanced search functionality, building a reliable data pipeline that syncs and enriches PostgreSQL records through Kafka topics
Refactored critical React and Ruby on Rails components, directly reducing production bugs, optimising performance, and improving overall user and developer experience
Developed complex, data-sensitive features with strict focus on writing atomic, highly reusable, and scalable code

work.name: ShakaCode
work.summary: Remote full-stack consultant working across multiple client products simultaneously. Specialised in Ruby on Rails, ReactJS, and PostgreSQL — shipping features, driving migrations, and integrating third-party systems under tight timelines and varying business contexts.
highlights: Consulted for multiple clients — including Blade, Hichee, and Clozemaster — building and maintaining applications using Ruby on Rails, ReactJS, and PostgreSQL
Balanced multiple projects simultaneously, quickly adapting to new business logic and tech stacks
Executed a complete system migration, rebuilding a legacy Ruby/ERB application into a modern, fully API-based architecture
Built a complete SEO project to improve application search rankings, collaborating with an external team for data collection and execution
Integrated third-party services like Klaviyo to support marketing campaigns and customer outreach

work.name: Yodawy
work.summary: Maintained and extended core microservices for a healthcare platform built on PHP Laravel and MySQL. Improved system performance, and built internal tooling to support engineering and operations teams.
highlights: Maintained core microservices in PHP Laravel, directly supporting the main customer-facing application; refactored large sections of legacy code into modern, reliable components
Built custom internal dashboards with Laravel Livewire for data and service management
Optimised API performance system-wide through a custom-built, highly reusable API caching module with expiration and tag control
Implemented interactive spatial operations utilising Google Maps and MySQL spatial features, allowing teams to seamlessly view and edit geographic data

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Designed, developed, and maintained full-stack web and mobile applications for various clients. Focused on delivering clean RESTful APIs and responsive, browser-based single-page applications across a range of technologies and domains.
highlights: Designed and developed RESTful backend systems
Built responsive single-page applications across various technologies

work.name: BBI Consultancy
work.position: Data Science and Machine Learning Intern
work.summary: Studied and applied modern Machine Learning and AI models in a professional consulting environment, building practical foundations in data science alongside exposure to real-world business use cases.
highlights: Studied and applied cutting-edge Machine Learning and AI models and algorithms

work.name: EasyKash
work.summary: Contributed to production front-end development using Angular 2+ and Ionic4 within an Agile Scrum team, gaining hands-on experience in iterative delivery and cross-functional collaboration.
highlights: Gained hands-on experience with Angular 2+ and Ionic4
Worked in an Agile Scrum environment

projects.name: Chatbot for Information Retrieval System
projects.description: Engineered an innovative information retrieval system capable of extracting crucial information from unstructured and raw data in document formats such as PDFs. Designed to assist users in answering domain-specific queries within closed domain areas.
highlights: Fine-tuned BERT NLP model using the SQuAD dataset for analyzing, extracting, and ranking answers
Used RASA chatbot framework as the backend for natural language understanding and seamless interactions
Graduation project in collaboration with Mentor Graphics

certificates.name: Embedded Systems Diploma, AVR Architecture
certificates.summary: Completed an Embedded Systems Diploma focusing on AVR Architecture, acquiring hands-on experience in developing efficient drivers for Atmega32 internal modules. Gained proficiency in working with AVR architecture and embedded systems development. 120 hours total.
